product.description: Image data of the mouse brain detailing axonal projections labeled by viral tracers.
product.name: Mouse Connectivity Projection

donor.condition-description: tissuecyte - PMT (V) tissuecyte - V2 setting (retarder) tissuecyte - Laser Wavelength (nm) tissuecyte - ImageDepth (um) tissuecyte - Power at Objective (mW)
